abilities.description: When you focus your mind and attune a weapon to latent energy fields, roll +heart. On a strong hit, the wielder is empowered; when the wielder makes a move to inflict harm with it and score a hit, mark progress. If they roll a 1 on their action die, the effect is lost. On a weak hit, as above, but the attunement drains you; make a suffer move (-2).

Once per fight, the wielder may trigger a surge from the weapon to take an automatic strong hit when they @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash}. If they do, the energy is destabilizing; they @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (-1).

Once per attunement, the wielder may discharge the weapon's energy to take an automatic strong hit when making the @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2051538f0c9d5d27]{Heal} move. If they do, take +1 momentum.
